name: ADGS Advisory, Inc.
summary: ADGS Advisory, Inc., through its subsidiary, Quality Online Education Group, Inc. is an e-learning company that provides online English lessons to students in China. It offers online English programs for pre-school to grades 6, white label online tutoring services, and end-to-end management software solutions for education institutions. The company also provides professional recruitment services for education organizations seeking educators. ADGS Advisory, Inc. is based in Richmond Hill, Canada.
